name: @kortix/registry
description: Kortix registry + marketplace engine. A shadcn-compatible registry format (registry.json / registry-item.json) plus build, resolve, and install primitives — turn any Kortix repo into a registry and 1-click install skills, agents, commands, tools, files, folders, or whole projects. Used by the `kortix` CLI today; the API + web marketplace build on the same engine.
